Package ui.tooltip

Class Tooltip

java.lang.Object
ui.tooltip.Tooltip
public class Tooltip extends Object
The Tooltip class represents the data model for a UI tooltip.

It supports recursive references, where a tooltip can "contain" or "reference" other tooltips within its description. These references are resolved by the TooltipLayer for multi-column display.

  • Constructor Details

    • Tooltip

      public Tooltip(String title, javafx.scene.paint.Color color, Object... description)
      Constructs a new Tooltip.
      Parameters:
      title - The title text.
      color - The title color.
      description - An array of Objects (Strings or Tooltips) for the body.

  • Method Details

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns:
      The title text of this tooltip.

    • getTitleColor

      public javafx.scene.paint.Color getTitleColor()
      Returns:
      The color used for the tooltip title.

    • getDescription

      public javafx.scene.text.TextFlow getDescription()
      Generates a JavaFX TextFlow representing the formatted description.

      Tooltip references within the description are rendered with distinct colors and underlining.

      Returns:
      A styled TextFlow.

    • getRefs

      public List<Tooltip> getRefs()
      Extracts all other tooltips referenced in this tooltip's description.
      Returns:
      A list of unique Tooltip references.

    • ref

      public static Tooltip ref(Object o)
      Helper to safely get a Tooltip reference from an object.
      Parameters:
      o - The object (Tippable, Tooltip, or String).
      Returns:
      A Tooltip instance.

    • getContainerFor

      public static Tippable getContainerFor(Tippable... tipTargets)
      Creates a dummy Tippable that aggregates multiple sources.
      Parameters:
      tipTargets - The sources to combine.
      Returns:
      A combined Tippable.
